name: Calumma M MC
comment:
Calumma™ M MC: Featuring an optical design using 7 high efficacy multi-chip LEDs and
available with optional LED colour variants and various beam angles, the
medium-sized Calumma M MC luminaire creates powerful and beautiful
light output for a spot, accent or flood lighting solution. Its durable hou-
sing is built to withstand any exterior conditions, and its special finish
for harsh and marine environments provides an exceptional outdoor
LED luminaire in an elegant design. Additionally, Calumma M MC can
be connected in long In/Out daisy-chains via an E-Box and hybrid Plug
& Play connections for almost effortless installation. Complemented by
wide range of accessories and control protocols, this luminaire is an
effective and versatile unit to get the most out of architectural lighting
applications.
